task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Bounces' was created under Local Folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Bounces' is visible in the email client's left sidebar/folder pane, specifically nested under 'Local Folders'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent identified and viewed the bounce notification emails in the Inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is shown viewing the Inbox and has selected, previewed, or opened the bounce notification emails (e.g., subjects like 'Delivery failure' or 'Undelivered Mail...') to read their contents.

task_completion.description: Verify that the target text file was created for the extracted addresses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) is open editing a file named 'bounced_contacts.txt', or the file icon is visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct failed recipient addresses were extracted and saved to the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'bounced_contacts.txt' are visible and contain exactly the four expected email addresses (j.doe@expired-domain.com, former_employee@corp.example.com, sales-info@invalid-domain.net, admin@old-startup.io), with one address per line.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bounce notification emails were moved from the Inbox to the 'Bounces' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bounces' folder is selected in the email client, and the main view shows the bounce notification emails inside it. Additionally, these emails should no longer appear in the Inbox.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the email client's graphical interface to manage emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Thunderbird GUI to read and move the emails, rather than using terminal commands (like mv or grep) directly on the underlying maildir files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually read the emails to find the addresses.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent opens or previews the bodies of the bounce emails to locate the failed recipient addresses, rather than typing them out immediately without looking at the email contents.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent manually extracted and entered the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent manually types or copy-pastes the addresses into the text file using a text editor or standard CLI tools, rather than executing a pre-existing script to bypass the extraction process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target text file: /home/ga/Desktop/bounced_contacts.txt. Expected destination folder: 'Bounces' under Local Folders. Expected failed recipient addresses to extract (must be one per line): j.doe@expired-domain.com, former_employee@corp.example.com, sales-info@invalid-domain.net, and admin@old-startup.io.
